summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ReversePicks soccer prediction webapp iteration 2. Backend APIs maintain 100% success rate. Frontend fully functional with dark theme, navigation, and AI features. NEW VENUE FILTER FEATURE confirmed working - venue filter buttons (All/Home/Away) appear in recent form section with 15+ samples showing venue tags (H/A).

minor_issues.issue: AI prediction occasionally returns None/0 values for projectedValue and recommendation when player data is limited
minor_issues.impact: Prediction display may show empty values for some players
minor_issues.note: Same issue as iteration 1, but feature works correctly with players who have sufficient historical data

passed_tests: Leagues endpoint returns 30 leagues with proper categorization
Premier League teams endpoint returns 20 teams
Player search functionality (found players for Messi, Kane, Salah)
Football API status shows online with valid subscription
AI prediction endpoint with venue data (Mohamed Salah: 19 samples with home/away venues)
Homepage loads with dark theme and ReversePicks header
Bottom navigation with 3 tabs (PREDICT, TRACKING, CHAT) all functional
AI Wizard interface with Step-by-Step and Natural Search modes
League selection → player search flow working
TRACKING tab loads with empty state correctly
CHAT tab loads with Tactical Uplink and welcome message
NEW FEATURE: Venue filter buttons (All/Home/Away) in recent form section
NEW FEATURE: 15+ recent samples with venue tags (H/A) displayed
NEW FEATURE: Venue filter interactions functional (buttons become active)
NEW FEATURE: Backend fetches 20 matches with venue tags correctly
All required data-testid attributes present for testing

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core features working, venue filter feature confirmed)
